mnemonics: ICE CAPS: Integrity Constraints Enforce Accuracy, Consistency, And Proper Structure
keyPoints: Domain Constraints define valid values for attributes
Referential Integrity Constraints maintain valid links between tables via foreign keys
commonMistakes: Confusing entity integrity (primary keys) with referential integrity (foreign keys)
Forgetting that NULL values can violate integrity constraints
Assuming all constraints are automatically enforced by the DBMS without proper declaration
